p.strong: Invariant: At most one leader per term

g.text: Step 2: Verify At Most One Leader Per Term

div.p: Election Safety At most one leader can be elected in a given term. Enforced by: Quorum intersection — any two majorities overlap by at least one node, and that node cannot vote twice in the same term.
Message: "ELECTION SAFETY VIOLATION: term 3 has 2 leaders: [Node A, Node B]"
